title: heliotropium szovitsii
intro: Heliotropium szovitsii, also known as the Afghan heliotrope, is a plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Central Asia, for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Heliotropium szovitsii include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Heliotropium szovitsii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
